name: Creamy Feta Yogurt Dressing (Or Dip!)
recipeIngredient: 1 garlic clove (or sub 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder)
1/2 cup plain greek yogurt (whole milk or 2%)
1-2 teaspoons water, to thin if necessary
Freshly ground salt and pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions: Add the garlic, yogurt, feta and lemon juice to a food processor or blender; process until smooth. Add a bit of salt and pepper to taste and process once more and water if necessary to thin to your liking.
author: ambitiouskitchen.com
nutrition: Fat: 2.6 g | Calories: 47 kcal | Saturated Fat: 1.7 g | Carbohydrate: 1.8 g | Sugar: 1.1 g | Serving Size: 2 tablespoons | Protein: 4.2 g
